message:
feat(fcp-e2e): Add report serialization and interop test integration

Enhance the E2E testing framework with report persistence and protocol
interop verification:

1. E2eReport serialization (lib.rs):
   - to_json_lines(): Serialize logs as newline-delimited JSON
   - write_json_lines(): Persist report to JSONL file for analysis

2. Protocol interop test runner (lib.rs):
   - run_interop_suite(): Execute fcp_conformance interop tests
   - Captures pass/fail summary with failure details
   - Integrates results into unified E2eLogEntry format
   - Reports structured JSON with test names, categories, messages

3. E2eLogger enhancements (logging.rs):
   - drain(): Take ownership of collected entries (for batching)
   - write_json_lines(): File output for log persistence
   - Minor formatting improvements to redact_secrets()

These additions enable:
- Persisting test results for CI/CD artifact collection
- Running FCP protocol conformance tests as part of E2E suite
- Unified reporting across connector and interop tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
